The enduro Difference

YOUR BODY
deserves
BETTER.

Polyester is petroleum-based plastic. It traps heat, sheds microplastics, and carries chemical additives that absorb through your skin during exercise. Here's what you're moving away from — and toward.

🧬

No Endocrine Disruptors

Polyester and nylon fabrics contain chemical additives that can migrate through sweat-soaked skin. Natural fibres are chemically inert — nothing synthetic touching your body, ever.

🫁

No Microplastics in Your Body

Studies now find microplastic particles in human blood, lungs, and organs. Every synthetic wash sheds thousands of them. enduro sheds zero — because there's nothing plastic to shed.

🌡️

Skin That Can Breathe

Synthetic fabrics trap heat and create a humid microclimate against your skin, promoting bacterial growth and irritation. Natural fibres regulate temperature and allow genuine breathability — your skin functions as it should.

🦠

Naturally Antibacterial

Merino's lanolin and bamboo's bio-kun structure inhibit bacterial growth without synthetic antimicrobial treatments. No silver nanoparticles, no chemical finishes — just what nature built in.

💧

Moisture Without Chemicals

Synthetic moisture-wicking relies on chemical DWR treatments that degrade, flake, and absorb into skin. Natural fibres wick sweat through their structure alone — no coatings, no compromise.

Why We Exist

THE high
IS NATURAL.

Peak performance was never engineered in a lab. It was refined over millennia by nature itself.

Every enduro piece is built from premium natural fibres chosen for breathability, thermoregulation, durability, and movement without relying on petroleum-based synthetics. Built to endure.

What We Use

THE Fibres

01

Merino Wool

Ultra-fine 17.5–18.5 micron merino. Temperature-regulating, naturally odour-resistant, and softer against skin than any synthetic. Performs from dawn trails to post-run commutes.

Thermoregulating Anti-odour ZQ Certified Biodegradable
02

Organic Cotton

GOTS-certified, grown without pesticides or synthetic fertilisers. Exceptional softness, breathability, and durability. The foundation of our gym-focused range.

GOTS Certified OEKO-TEX Hypoallergenic Durable
03

Bamboo Blend

Extraordinarily soft, naturally antibacterial, and moisture-wicking. Bamboo grows without irrigation at remarkable speed — the most renewable fibre we source.

Antibacterial Moisture-wicking Renewable UV Protective
04

Hemp Fibre

The strongest natural fibre on earth. Carbon-negative to grow, UV-protective to wear, and only gets better with every wash. The backbone of our technical running pieces.

Carbon Negative UPF 40+ Strongest Fibre Improves with Age
05

Tencel™

Lyocell derived from sustainably sourced eucalyptus wood pulp. Exceptionally smooth against skin, naturally moisture-managing, and produced in a closed-loop process that recycles water and solvents.

Closed-loop Process Moisture-managing OEKO-TEX Biodegradable
